sentences.arabic: طَلَبَتِ المُعَلِّمَةُ مِنَ الطُّلَّابِ إِحْضَارَ صُوَرِ عَائِلَاتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnica je zamolila učenike da donesu slike svojih porodica.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher asked the students to bring pictures of their families.

sentences.arabic: عَرَضَ كُلُّ طَالِبٍ صُورَتَهُ وَتَحَدَّثَ عَنْ عَائِلَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki učenik je pokazao svoju sliku i pričao o porodici.
sentences.translationEn: Each student showed their picture and talked about their family.

sentences.translation: Učenici su s pažnjom slušali svoje drugove.
sentences.translationEn: The students listened attentively to their classmates.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّشَاطُ مُمْتِعًا وَتَعَرَّفُوا عَلَى بَعْضِهِمْ أَكْثَرَ.
sentences.translation: Aktivnost je bila zabavna i bolje su se upoznali.
sentences.translationEn: The activity was fun and they got to know each other better.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَ الطُّلَّابُ المُعَلِّمَةَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الفِكْرَةِ الجَمِيلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su zahvalili nastavnici na ovoj lijepoj ideji.
sentences.translationEn: The students thanked the teacher for this beautiful idea.
